ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course (e.g., CS1101) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course (e.g., Introduction to Computer Science) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* The semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* The number of credits the course is worth */,
  "enrollment_capacity" INTEGER /* The maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* The current number of students enrolled in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Computer Science) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department chairperson (foreign key to instructors table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_chairperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("chairperson_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* The location of the instructor's office */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* The instructor's office hours */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback session */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the session is associated with */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the feedback session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., Open, Published, Private, Awaiting) */,
  "response_rate" TEXT /* Response rate of the session */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the session was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the session was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the feedback session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the feedback session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the feedback session */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback session is anonymous */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Who can view the feedback results (e.g., Instructor, Students, Public) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* The version number of the feedback session to track changes */,
  "survey_template_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the survey template used for the session (foreign key to survey_templates table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_sessions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_sessions_survey_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_template_id") REFERENCES survey_templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback session the action is associated with */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., Edit, Delete, Copy, Submit, Results, View Results, Publish Results, Remind, Remind all students, Remind particular students) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* The type of action (e.g., Administrative, User) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_actions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES feedback_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., instructor, administrator, student) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback session the response is associated with */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "response_details" TEXT /* Details of the response (e.g., text, ratings) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* A numerical rating given by the student */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Whether the response is anonymous */,
  "is_viewed_by_student" INTEGER /* Whether the response has been viewed by the student */,
  "is_viewed_by_instructor" INTEGER /* Whether the response has been viewed by the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_responses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_responses_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES feedback_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "major" TEXT /* The student's major */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* The year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the student's adviser (foreign key to instructors table) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the student is currently active in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_adviser_id FOREIGN KEY ("adviser_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey template */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the survey template */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the survey template was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the survey template was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)
